schemas.label: Input channel contribution packet
schemas.description: Browser-exported community input-channel packets for Hugo marketplace pull requests.

schemas.label: Output channel contribution packet
schemas.description: Browser-exported community output-route packets for Hugo marketplace pull requests.

schemas.label: Report profile contribution packet
schemas.description: Browser-exported report-profile packets for Hugo marketplace pull requests.

schemas.label: Workflow template contribution packet
schemas.description: Browser-exported workflow-pack packets for Hugo marketplace pull requests.

schemas.label: Local marketplace library
schemas.description: Portable browser-local library payload for private input, output, report, and workflow packs.

schemas.label: Case file
schemas.description: Validates exported Caseboard JSON bundles before they are handed to another tool or reviewer.

schemas.label: Caseboard library
schemas.description: Portable browser-local case library payload for importing and exporting saved investigations.

schemas.label: Asset and ownership library
schemas.description: Portable browser-local asset criticality and ownership library for enriching exposures and cases.

schemas.label: Operations history
schemas.description: Portable browser-local activity ledger for source syncs, chat sessions, agent runs, case actions, and report exports.

schemas.label: Operations session
schemas.description: Portable browser-local grouped investigation session for correlated source syncs, AI runs, case actions, and handoff exports.

schemas.label: Portfolio coverage snapshot
schemas.description: Dependency-aware portfolio coverage snapshot with route readiness, fan-out, and downstream exposure impact.

schemas.label: Routing policy
schemas.description: Validates one owner-aware routing policy before it is reused across planner, exposure, or case flows.

schemas.label: Routing policy library
schemas.description: Portable browser-local routing policy library for owner-aware downstream defaults and approval routing.
